title: MC ELO Tiertagger
description: A fork of tiertagger to add support for mc elo
body:
A fork of the [Tiertagger Mod](https://github.com/mctiers-dev/TierTagger) that adds support to the [MCELO Tierlist](http://fi8.bot-hosting.net:21957/). This fork doesnt remove support for mctiers or subtiers.

To select the mc elo tierlist open the ukulib menu through the minecraft options and select Tiertagger (MC ELO). Then select Tierlists and click on MC ELO then go back and click clear Tires Cache and relog the server you were playing
